reviews.review_description:
I saw a 1 star review stating game sucks cant beat lvl 5 so I was like I wanna see if I can beat lvl 5 lol. Unfortunately while lvl 5 is in fact beatable, beating it just starts you back on lvl 5  (come to find out its cuz im not good enough 😆) Dev has patched to show why I couldn't pass. I upgraded my score to 4 stars until I get a chance to try again as its actually fun and challenging.

Edit: ok this game is actually 🔥 just got to lvl 7 and man that Endless 1 lvl was crazy! Definitely a game that grows on you the more you play it.

I am a bit worried about lvl 16 looking ahead tho as all the others unlock with 100,000 points but lvl 16 says it requires 600,000 to unlock 🤯

Unlocked Endless 2 now. I even managed to go back and redo some levels completing them with only 1 grapple 🤯 yea Im addicted 😆

developer_response.body:
Hi 234n,
It has come to my attention that I did a very poor job explaining how to unlock endless 1. In order to unlock endless 1,  you needed to complete levels 1-5 using fewer than 50 grapples. If you beat level 5 having used more than 50 grapples on levels 1-5, it just reloads level 5. I have now added a system that should make this more clear to players, and upped the grapple requirement to 75 for levels 1-5. I understand your frustration, this needed to be fixed sooner😅.

reviews.review_description: For a small game made by one guy, this is pretty impressive. Great music, fun but hard gameplay, and decently intuitive. Whoever helped with the banner art must be really cool too.
Love this game. It’s like being a monkey in the trees and swinging through your next box! Music is fun too! And I’m a boomer!!
Took a little while to get the hang of things, but once i did it was really fun.

developer_response.body:
Glad to hear it :)
The game now has a speed setting to make it easier to get the hang of things.

reviews.review_description: The Grapple physics in this game are easily the best I`ve played with.

developer_response.body:
Thank you :)
I tried to make them feel realistic, while still being satisfying and fun.
